description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, slightly curved rectangular body and rounded corners. The front features a large, glossy touchscreen display with minimal bezels, showing a digital clock, date, and a blue abstract wallpaper. The back is a solid matte brown color with a single camera module and flash located near the top left. The sides are slim and metallic, with subtle button placements visible. The overall design is minimalist and ergonomic, typical of contemporary mobile phones. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with plastic and electronic components inside.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large glossy screen, matte brown back, and a single rear camera module.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with digital clock, date, and blue abstract wallpaper.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim, slightly curved metallic edge and minimal thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte brown back with a single camera module and flash near the top left.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thin, curved edge with no visible buttons.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock reading 12:45, the date 'Sun, February 21', and a blue abstract wallpaper. No app icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera module and flash are located near the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: One physical button is visible on the right edge, likely a power or volume button. Two capacitive or physical buttons are present below the screen on the front.
